title: Add Aeona AI Roleplay  Companion to Chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: A new companion enters the chat
gist.blurb: Aeona AI Roleplay Companion has been added to the community showcase. Perfect for when you need a meaningful conversation and the rubber duck just isn't cutting it.
gist.summary: Added the Aeona AI Roleplay Companion app to the community showcase directory.
gist.impact: The community directory now features Aeona AI, highlighting another creative way developers are using the text API for conversational agents.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a roleplay companion app. Visuals should represent roleplay, chatting, and companionship. Polly the bee wearing a fun roleplay accessory (like a tiny wizard hat or theater mask) having a cozy chat with a friendly holographic or fantasy companion.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, sitting at a small wooden table having a tea party and chatting with a friendly glowing holographic companion. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
